q: What does Nietzsche mean by the will to power? Answer using the connected corpus and quote it verbatim.
final:
I tried to retrieve the relevant “will to power” passages from the connected **nietzsche** corpus, but the tool calls that are supposed to return the note contents (`federated_note_html`) came back empty (they returned `{"ok": true, "text": ""}` for the matched items).

Because of that, I **can’t quote Nietzsche’s “will to power” from the connected corpus verbatim**, and I also can’t responsibly summarize what the corpus says beyond the tiny snippets shown in search results.

If you want, I can try again by opening other matched pages in the same corpus (or you can tell me which language—EN/RU—you prefer).
